prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
An inspection on T-009 has just been completed in the field with no abnormal condition observed. Open a work order documenting that the inspection took place, then close it out with a note recording the clean inspection result.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the newly created work order identifier and its initial status, then confirm a follow-up update that transitions the work order to a closed state with a closure note referencing the clean inspection finding.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [wo] create_work_order — Open a new work order for transformer T-009 to document the completed inspection
  Step 2: [wo] update_work_order — Close the work order with a note recording the clean inspection result (depends on steps [1])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Open a new work order for transformer T-009 to document the completed inspection",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009",
      "issue_description": "Completed inspection with no abnormal conditions observed",
      "priority": "low"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-D9A11B1F\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Completed inspection with no abnormal conditions observed\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T09:53:36.236209Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Close the work order with a note recording the clean inspection result",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {},
    "response": "",
    "executor_success": false,
    "error": "{\n  \"errors\": [\n    {\n      \"code\": \"downstream_request_failed\",\n      \"message\": \"Downstream vllm request failed: \",\n      \"more_info\": \"https://cloud.ibm.com/apidocs/watsonx-ai#text-chat\"\n    }\n  ],\n  \"trace\": \"493ba58c9cdaab73245be7ffc014dab4\",\n  \"status_code\": 500\n}",
    "success": false
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
The work order (WO-D9A11B1F) for transformer T-009 was successfully opened to document the completed inspection, but an error occurred when attempting to close the work order with a note recording the clean inspection result.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Ensure the update_work_order tool is called with the correct arguments and handles downstream request failures."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Ensure the update_work_order tool is called with the correct arguments and handles downstream request failures.
